codeReview.summary: The original refactor commit introduced mover CSV contract drift in `parseMoverPriceChangePercentage`, but the later follow-up fix `999bfd233dab0162a4e2c30893b6325231204718` restores the current behavior to the historical compatibility contract. In the current repository state, the coins module remains split into focused units and I did not find any remaining blocking issue attributable to this feature.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, original handoff and commit diff, prior failed review, follow-up fix feature, transcript skeletons, skill guidance, and current `src/modules/coins/helpers.ts` / `tests/app.test.ts` state. The refactor itself briefly introduced trailing-comma mover parsing drift, but that regression is authoritatively fixed by `top-gainers-losers-trailing-comma-compatibility-fix`, so no blocking issue remains in the current milestone state for `refactor-coins-module-with-characterization`.
